Mineral Clay Soap- Rhassoul
products.body_html:
Rhassoul Mineral Clay

Soften + Hydrate 

Rhassoul is great for dry and flaky skin. It draws out impurities but also hydrates the skin and leaves it firm and soft.

Cold process soap is made from natural ingredients such as oils, butters, herbs and is known to be gentle on skin. Each bar produces a rich lather leaving your skin silky smooth. This comes mainly from the olive oil base, a luxury near impossible to find in commercial bars. 

Fragrance & Colorant Free

Ingredients: Saponified Olive Oil, Coconut Oil, Castor Oil, Sweet Almond Oil, Shea Butter, Mineral Clay, Sodium Lactate, Citric Acid. 

Quality: All of our products are free of Phthalates, Parabens, SLS, and SLES

Due to the handmade nature of this product the bar of soap you receive may vary slightly. Colors, shapes, and designs differ between batches. Each bar weighs approximately 4-5oz.

products.title: Sea Salt x Ancient Tide Soap Crumble
Solid Dish Soap & Brush
products.body_html:
Solid Dish Soap Block + Bamboo Brush

Cut through grease and grime with this eco-friendly alternative to traditional dish soap. Our Round Dish Soap Block is a solid, concentrated formula that lasts longer than liquid soap—all without the plastic packaging.

Just wet your sponge or brush, rub it on the soap bar to create a rich lather, and get to washing. Powerful yet gentle, it effectively cleans dishes, pots, and pans while keeping your kitchen low-waste.

Care Tip: Allow the soap block to dry completely between uses by storing it on a draining soap dish or a soap rest to extend its lifespan.

  • Plastic-free

  • Long-lasting

  • Zero-waste kitchen essential

products.title: African Black Soap
products.body_html:
Derived originally from West Africa, our premium raw African Black Soap is made in Ghana through traditional hot process method using African recipes and techniques with no artificial fragrances.
African black soap is a plant-based cleanser made from the ash of locally harvested African plants and dried peels. Traditional recipes use palm kernel oil and the filtrate of burnt cocoa pod ash.
Since this soap is RAW*, do not rub the soap directly on the face or skin. Lather soap in hand or washcloth and apply to face, body, or hair.
*This soap may contain small particles of plantains that could scratch or cause irritation.

Ingredients: Palm Kennel Oil, Coconut Oil, Stearin Oil, Cocoa Pod Husk, Unrefined Shea Butter, Plantain Skin Ash, Natural Vitamin E, Natural Sodium, Water

products.body_html:
Sweet Coffee - Limited Edition

Scent Category: Sweet + Spicy

🫧 Top Notes: Spice

🫧 Middle Notes: Coffee

🫧 Base Notes: Cinnamon Sugar

Embed: Gemstones

| H A N G I N G |  O I L |  D I F F U S E R |

The Soap House brings you hanging oil diffusers in glass bottles with twelve different scents to choose from. Each scent is paired with different gemstones to make them unique. These are most popular to hang in the car for a light scent that will make your ride more enjoyable. We source the highest quality oils that are non-toxic and free of phthalates, parabens, SLS, and SLES. Each oil comes individually packaged and are great for gifting. We frequently sell out of this item. If you do not see the one you are looking for please contact us.


| H O W  | T O |

First, remove the stopper from under the wooden lid, then replace the wooden lid securely (Not too tight or it can damage the lid). Turn the bottle upside down, only for a few seconds allowing the lid to absorb the oil. It will also eventually travel up the string to the wooden bead.

Hang the bottle from the string wherever you would like it to be. To refresh your scent, invert the bottle for a few seconds. When not in use, you can put the stopper back into the bottle.


| P L E A S E |  N O T E |

The product is not intended to treat, diagnose, or cure any diseases or ailments. Do not use the product if you are sensitive to any of it’s ingredients. Do not consume and avoid getting product in your eyes. Keep the bottle hanging when in use to avoid leaking or transferring to surfaces as oils may stain. Although we research/source the best ingredients, we are not claiming to be medical professionals. Be cautious when storing in extreme heat.

Each glass bottle is hand poured and weighs approximately 8 ML.

products.title: Mineral Clay Soap Sample Set
products.body_html:
| M I N E R A L | C L A Y | S O A P | S A M P L E | S E T |
This set includes all 6 of our mineral clay cold process soaps each weighing 2oz. It’s a great way to try all of the bars or have each one available for your needs. Each soap set is packaged in a box with type and ingredients listed inside.

| B R A Z I L I A N | P U R P L E  | C L A Y |
This clay is known for it’s purple color, which is due to the high iron oxide & magnesium content in the volcanic soil located in Brazil where it is found. Magnesium is known to help cell renewal which will make the skin more smooth and firm. The high levels of iron and minerals may help to draw out toxins and impurities in the skin. The clay is gentle for sensitive skin and daily use. Please review full ingredients list below.  

| B R A Z I L I A N | Y E L L O W | C L A Y |
This yellow clay is a type of Kaolin Clay that is harvested near sedimentary beds in the Amazon. It is silica-rich which may help with skin cell renewal. Potassium found in the clay may help with hydration and nourishment. The antioxidants may help protect the skin from environmental damage. This mineral clay is great for sensitive skin and daily use. Please review full ingredients list below. 

| D E A D | S E A | M U D | C L A Y |
Dead Sea Mud is a naturally-occurring element that's harvested from the Dead Sea, the deepest Salt Lake in the world located between Israel & Jordan. This clay works to balance the oils in the skin and draw out impurities therefore it is know to be great for oily and acne prone skin. The mineral rich clay may tighten and smooth the skin while also reducing pore size. Although it is great for oily skin, all skin types may benefit. Please review full ingredients list below. 

| F R E N C H | G R E E N | C L A Y |
This green clay is a type of Illite clay that is naturally formed from the weathering & erosion of volcanic ash and other minerals off the southern coast of France in rock quarries. It is known for it’s toning and firming properties. It may be used as a gentle exfoliator that will remove dead skin cells leaving the skin more smooth and firm. It is known to have soothing and wound healing properties which makes it effective on sensitive skin. Please review full ingredients list below. 

| F R E N C H  | P I N K  | C L A Y |
French pink clay is found in the south of France, where it's harvested from an inactive volcano. It is a type of bentonite clay that is made from volcanic ash and is rich in minerals like boron, calcium, copper, iron, magnesium, potassium, silica, and sodium. It may help to remove excess oils, detoxify, and treat acne. It is considered one of the more milder clays and therefore is ideal for any skin type including mature skin. Please review full ingredients list below.

| M O R O C C A N  | R E D | C L A Y |
Moroccan Red Clay, also known as Rhassoul Clay, is a type of smectite clay that is found in the Atlas Mountains of Morocco. It was once reserved for royalty in ancient Egypt. Due to it’s high iron oxide content it may help with blood circulation and fluid retention reducing the appearance of cellulite. With minerals like calcium, magnesium, and zinc, it may lighten the skin tone, reducing pigmentation and melasma. It is known to reduce oils and detoxify the skin and even the scalp. It is safe for all skin types. Please review full ingredients list below.

| C O L D | P R O C E S S | M E T H O D |
These soap bars are created using a cold process method. The first step is to melt the oils and butters together then mix in diluted lye. When it is the perfect temperature and consistency it is poured into a mold. When it is ready, each loaf is then hand cut into individual 4 ounce bars. Due to the handmade nature of the product, some may vary in weight but we aim to make each bar the same. The soap will then cure for up to three weeks and the PH levels are tested to make sure it is skin safe. We use the highest quality oils and organic shea butter, therefore the soap will have a hydrating feel while still cleansing the skin.

| I N G R E D I E N T S |
*Saponified Olive Oil Pomace, *Castor Oil, *Coconut Oil, *Sweet Almond Oil, *Organic Shea Butter, 100% Pure Clay, Sodium Lactate, Citric Acid.  *Refined

| I N F O |
Each loaf has been handcrafted in small batches with love! Due to the handmade nature of this product, you may receive slight variations in color, shape, and weight. Our mineral clay soap bars are made without artificial coloring therefore the color is occurring naturally from the mineral clay. We also chose to make these soaps unscented so the most sensitive noses and skin will benefit. They are cruelty-free and zero waste. They are free of - palm oil, parabens, phthalates, SLS, SLES, detergents, surfactants, petrochemicals, propylene glycol, known carcinogens, prop 65 chemicals.
 If you have any questions about the product please feel free to contact us.

| S T O R A G E | 
Natural soap does best in cool dark places out of direct sunlight. Sunlight will cause the soap to fade in color. The use of a soap saver or dish will prolong the life of the soap. Avoid leaving the soap in any sitting water. 

| P L E A S E | N O T E |
The ingredients used are incorporated for their reputed benefits. The effects are from personal opinion and reported claims. The product is not intended to treat, diagnose, or cure any diseases or ailments. If you have sensitive skin or are unsure, test the product on a small area first. Do not use the product if you are sensitive to any of it’s ingredients. If you experience irritation, stop using the product. Do not consume and avoid getting product in your eyes. Although we research/source the best ingredients, we are not claiming to be medical professionals.

products.body_html:
Aqua Vetiver

Scent Category: Fresh + Woody

🫧 Top Notes: Japanese grapefruit, bergamot, lemon

🫧 Middle Notes: Peppercorn, ginger, jasmine, aquatic marine notes, peppermint

🫧 Base Notes: Patchouli, cedar, vetiver, labdanum, frankincense

Embed: Aventurine

| H A N G I N G |  O I L |  D I F F U S E R |

The Soap House brings you hanging oil diffusers in glass bottles with twelve different scents to choose from. Each scent is paired with different gemstones to make them unique. These are most popular to hang in the car for a light scent that will make your ride more enjoyable. We source the highest quality oils that are non-toxic and free of phthalates, parabens, SLS, and SLES. Each oil comes individually packaged and are great for gifting. We frequently sell out of this item. If you do not see the one you are looking for please contact us.


| H O W  | T O |

First, remove the stopper from under the wooden lid, then replace the wooden lid securely (Not too tight or it can damage the lid). Turn the bottle upside down, only for a few seconds allowing the lid to absorb the oil. It will also eventually travel up the string to the wooden bead.

Hang the bottle from the string wherever you would like it to be. To refresh your scent, invert the bottle for a few seconds. When not in use, you can put the stopper back into the bottle.


| P L E A S E |  N O T E |

The product is not intended to treat, diagnose, or cure any diseases or ailments. Do not use the product if you are sensitive to any of it’s ingredients. Do not consume and avoid getting product in your eyes. Keep the bottle hanging when in use to avoid leaking or transferring to surfaces as oils may stain. Although we research/source the best ingredients, we are not claiming to be medical professionals. Be cautious when storing in extreme heat.

Each glass bottle is hand poured and weighs approximately 8 ML.

| A R O M A T I C | G O A T | M I L K |  S O A P |

The aromatic goat milk soaps are not just soap, they are an experience. The light scent invigorates the senses while the natural non-toxic ingredients clean the skin safely. Each bar is also infused with a natural light exfoliant powder that is safe for every day use. Goat milk soap is less allergenic than commercial soaps and it doesn't contain harsh chemicals or detergents that can strip your skin of oils. This can help keep your skin moist and prevent it from drying out or becoming irritated. Glycerin has the ability to cleanse the skin without clogging pores and promotes the skin's absorption of other beneficial ingredients. Please review all ingredients and info and if you have any questions, contact us.


| I N F O |

Each 4oz. bar has been handcrafted in small batches with love! Due to the handmade nature of this product, you may receive slight variations in color, shape, and weight. Each bar has been hand shaved and packaged individually to ensure safe storage and transit. These soaps are free of - parabens, phthalates, SLS, SLES, detergents, surfactants, petrochemicals, propylene glycol, known carcinogens, prop 65 chemicals.

If you have any questions about the product please feel free to contact us.

Vegetable Glycerin, Sodium Salts, Coconut Oil, Palm Oil, Sunflower Oil, Purified Water, Goat Milk, Titanium Dioxide, Germall Plus, Sweet Almond Oil, Fragrance Oil, Organic Sandalwood Powder, Mica Powder

Embed: Bamboo Coral

| H A N G I N G |  O I L |  D I F F U S E R |

The Soap House brings you hanging oil diffusers in glass bottles with twelve different scents to choose from. Each scent is paired with different gemstones to make them unique. These are most popular to hang in the car for a light scent that will make your ride more enjoyable. We source the highest quality oils that are non-toxic and free of phthalates, parabens, SLS, and SLES. Each oil comes individually packaged and are great for gifting. We frequently sell out of this item. If you do not see the one you are looking for please contact us.

 

| H O W  | T O |

First, remove the stopper from under the wooden lid, then replace the wooden lid securely (Not too tight or it can damage the lid). Turn the bottle upside down, only for a few seconds allowing the lid to absorb the oil. It will also eventually travel up the string to the wooden bead.

Hang the bottle from the string wherever you would like it to be. To refresh your scent, invert the bottle for a few seconds. When not in use, you can put the stopper back into the bottle.


| P L E A S E |  N O T E |

The product is not intended to treat, diagnose, or cure any diseases or ailments. Do not use the product if you are sensitive to any of it’s ingredients. Do not consume and avoid getting product in your eyes. Keep the bottle hanging when in use to avoid leaking or transferring to surfaces as oils may stain. Although we research/source the best ingredients, we are not claiming to be medical professionals. Be cautious when storing in extreme heat.

Each glass bottle is hand poured and weighs approximately 8 ML.

products.title: Aromatic Goat Milk Soap - Ocean Waves
products.body_html:
Ocean Waves + Sandalwood Powder

Scent Category: Clean + Fresh

🫧Smells like clean air

| A R O M A T I C | G O A T | M I L K |  S O A P |

The aromatic goat milk soaps are not just soap, they are an experience. The light scent invigorates the senses while the natural non-toxic ingredients clean the skin safely. Each bar is also infused with a natural light exfoliant powder that is safe for every day use. Goat milk soap is less allergenic than commercial soaps and it doesn't contain harsh chemicals or detergents that can strip your skin of oils. This can help keep your skin moist and prevent it from drying out or becoming irritated. Glycerin has the ability to cleanse the skin without clogging pores and promotes the skin's absorption of other beneficial ingredients. Please review all ingredients and info and if you have any questions, contact us.


| I N F O |

Each 4oz. bar has been handcrafted in small batches with love! Due to the handmade nature of this product, you may receive slight variations in color, shape, and weight. Each bar has been hand shaved and packaged individually to ensure safe storage and transit. These soaps are free of - parabens, phthalates, SLS, SLES, detergents, surfactants, petrochemicals, propylene glycol, known carcinogens, prop 65 chemicals.

If you have any questions about the product please feel free to contact us.


| I N G R E D I E N T S |

Vegetable Glycerin, Sodium Salts, Coconut Oil, Palm Oil, Sunflower Oil, Purified Water, Goat Milk, Titanium Dioxide, Germall Plus, Sweet Almond Oil, Fragrance Oil, Organic Sandalwood Powder, Mica Powder

 

-Sandalwood powder can help with anti-aging by firming the skin. It is known to reduce dark spots and even the tone. 


| S T O R A G E |

Natural soap does best in cool dark places out of direct sunlight. Sunlight will cause the soap and scent to fade in color. The use of a soap saver or dish will prolong the life of the soap. Avoid leaving the soap in any sitting water. Keep out of reach of children and pets.


| P L E A S E | N O T E |

The ingredients used are incorporated for their reputed benefits. The effects are from personal opinion and reported claims. The product is not intended to treat, diagnose, or cure any diseases or ailments. If you have sensitive skin or are unsure, test the product on a small area first. Do not use the product if you are sensitive to any of it’s ingredients. If you experience irritation, stop using the product. Do not consume and avoid getting product in your eyes. Although we research/source the best ingredients, we are not claiming to be medical professionals.

products.title: Hanging Oil Diffuser - Tobacco Vanille
products.body_html:
Tobacco Vanille

    Scent Category: Spicy + Warm

    🫧 Top Notes: Spices, Tobacco

    🫧 Middle Notes: Vanilla Cacao

    🫧 Base Notes: Woody

    Embed: Onyx

    | H A N G I N G |  O I L |  D I F F U S E R |

    The Soap House brings you hanging oil diffusers in glass bottles with twelve different scents to choose from. Each scent is paired with different gemstones to make them unique. These are most popular to hang in the car for a light scent that will make your ride more enjoyable. We source the highest quality oils that are non-toxic and free of phthalates, parabens, SLS, and SLES. Each oil comes individually packaged and are great for gifting. We frequently sell out of this item. If you do not see the one you are looking for please contact us.


    | H O W  | T O |

    First, remove the stopper from under the wooden lid, then replace the wooden lid securely (Not too tight or it can damage the lid). Turn the bottle upside down, only for a few seconds allowing the lid to absorb the oil. It will also eventually travel up the string to the wooden bead.

    Hang the bottle from the string wherever you would like it to be. To refresh your scent, invert the bottle for a few seconds. When not in use, you can put the stopper back into the bottle.

products.title: Mineral Clay Soap- Dead Sea Mud
products.body_html:
Dead Sea Mud Mineral Clay

Clarify + Smooth

Wildly used to detoxify the skin, dead sea mud is gentle but effective. It improves skin tone, texture, and clarity. The natural minerals help generate new skin cells which help with acne scars and uneven skin. The skin will look more smooth, plump and youthful.

Cold process soap is made from natural ingredients such as oils, butters, herbs and is known to be gentle on skin. Each bar produces a rich lather leaving your skin silky smooth. This comes mainly from the olive oil base, a luxury near impossible to find in commercial bars. 

Fragrance & Colorant Free

Ingredients: Saponified Olive Oil, Coconut Oil, Castor Oil, Sweet Almond Oil, Shea Butter, Mineral Clay, Sodium Lactate, Citric Acid. 

Quality: All of our products are free of Phthalates, Parabens, SLS, and SLES

Due to the handmade nature of this product the bar of soap you receive may vary slightly. Colors, shapes, and designs differ between batches. Each bar weighs approximately 4-5oz.
